---
title: "2020年度 国際マーケティング論"
output:
  html_document:
    # toc: true
    # toc_float:
    #   collapsed: false
    # df_print: "paged"
    # highlight: pygments
    # theme: lumen
    css: "template/style_index.css"
    includes:
      in_header: "template/head.html"
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(plotly)
```

更新日：`r format(Sys.time(), "%Y/%m/%d %H:%M")`
<br />

## [RとRStudioの準備](rstudio.html)

---
